tools.description: Retrieve the current repository index metadata, including file count, symbol count, chunk count, and the exact timestamp when the repository was last indexed.
tools.name: repo_status

tools.description: List all indexed files within the repository. Returns metadata such as relative path, size in bytes, and language. Useful for codebase structure discovery.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

tools.name: list_files

tools.description: List all programming languages detected and indexed in the repository, alongside support status.
tools.name: list_languages

tools.description: List or search indexed code symbols (such as classes, structs, functions, and interfaces) by name. Supports substring filtering.

limit.description: Maximum number of symbols to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: Substring query to filter symbol names. If omitted, returns all symbols.

tools.name: list_symbols

tools.description: Search indexed code symbols by name using exact or fuzzy matching. Essential for finding definitions.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: Fuzzy or exact search query for symbol names.

tools.name: search_symbols

tools.description: Detect high-level architectural components and directories in the repository based on file layouts.
tools.name: detect_architecture

tools.description: Show the configured or inferred boundaries between architectural components, useful to understand import constraints.
tools.name: architecture_boundaries

tools.description: Report any import or boundary violations that deviate from the defined codebase architecture rules.
tools.name: architecture_violations

tools.description: Evaluate repository-owned architecture policy dependency rules against indexed import, reference, and call graph edges. Returns allowed, forbidden, and unknown edge counts with bounded unknown samples.
tools.name: architecture_policy_check

tools.description: Perform a lexical BM25 search across indexed code chunks. Set mode=graph to search indexed graph-node identifiers, qualified names, routes, config keys, and properties.

limit.description: Maximum number of search results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

mode.description: Search mode. Defaults to code; graph searches indexed graph-node documents.

query.description: The search query containing terms, code patterns, identifiers, graph entity names, routes, or config keys.

tools.name: search_code

tools.description: Search indexed file names and contents for specific keywords or file path patterns. Set mode=graph to search graph-node documents through the same index.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

mode.description: Search mode. Defaults to code; graph searches indexed graph-node documents.

query.description: The search query to match against file paths, file contents, or graph-node documents.

tools.name: search_files

tools.description: Search indexed code using a regular expression pattern. Returns exact line matching snippets.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

pattern.description: A valid regular expression pattern to match against source code.

tools.name: regex_search

tools.description: Report the current status, readiness, and staleness of the local semantic vector index.
tools.name: semantic_status

tools.description: Search the local semantic vector index using natural language queries to retrieve conceptually related code snippets.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: Natural language search query expressing the concept or functionality you are looking for.

tools.name: semantic_search

tools.description: Perform a hybrid search combining lexical BM25 candidates and semantic vector candidates to produce ranked, context-rich results.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The search query to match lexically and conceptually against the codebase.

tools.name: hybrid_search

tools.description: Run a hybrid search and return detailed, explainable ranking scores and evidence for the top retrieved code snippets.

limit.description: Maximum number of explained results. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The search query to analyze and explain results for.

tools.name: explain_search_result

tools.description: Perform a structural search across both symbol trees and code chunks to find structural matching syntax.

limit.description: Maximum number of structural matches to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The query to run against structure trees and chunk indices.

tools.name: structural_search

tools.description: Retrieve the definition location, file range, and body of a symbol (function, class, struct, trait, module) by its name.

query.description: The exact or partial name of the symbol to find the definition for.

tools.name: get_definition

tools.description: Retrieve all references, usages, and call-sites of a given symbol throughout the indexed codebase.

limit.description: Maximum number of references to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the symbol to find references for.

tools.name: get_references

tools.description: Find all implementations of a given interface, trait, or abstract class in the repository.

limit.description: Maximum number of implementations to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the interface or trait.

tools.name: get_implementations

tools.description: Find all parent functions, methods, or modules that call the target symbol.

limit.description: Maximum number of callers to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the symbol whose callers you want to find.

tools.name: get_callers

tools.description: Find all functions, methods, or symbols called by the target symbol.

limit.description: Maximum number of callees to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the symbol whose calls you want to trace.

tools.name: get_callees

tools.description: Retrieve the comprehensive context of a symbol, including definition details, range, file context, and documentation if available.
tools.name: get_symbol_context

tools.description: Trace the shortest dependency or reference path between two files or symbols, illustrating how they are connected.

from.description: The starting node path or symbol name.

to.description: The target node path or symbol name.

tools.name: dependency_path

tools.description: Analyze the potential blast radius of a change to a file. Identifies downstream dependents, callers, and related test files.

path.description: The repository-relative path of the file to analyze.

tools.name: impact_analysis

tools.description: Look up bounded commit provenance for exactly one repository-relative path or indexed symbol. Returns first-seen, last-touched, recent touches, confidence, and explicit uncertainty.

limit.description: Maximum recent touches to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

symbol.description: Exact symbol name, qualified name, or symbol ID to inspect.

tools.name: history_provenance_lookup

tools.description: List the direct dependency graph neighbors (imports and dependents) of a given file or symbol node.

limit.description: Maximum number of neighbors to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

node.description: The file path or symbol node identifier.

tools.name: module_dependencies

tools.description: Assemble a comprehensive, token-efficient context pack of files, symbols, and tests relevant to a natural language task description.

format.description: The output format of the context pack.

limit.description: Maximum number of context results to include. Defaults to 20.

task.description: A natural language description of the task to gather context for.

tools.name: build_context_pack

tools.description: Build a reversible compressed context pack with references and handles. Allows retrieving original snippets later to save prompt space.

limit.description: Maximum number of context items. Defaults to 20.

task.description: A natural language description of the task.

tools.name: build_compressed_context

tools.description: Retrieve the original uncompressed source code snippet associated with a compressed context handle.

handle.description: The handle ID returned by build_compressed_context.

tools.name: retrieve_context

tools.description: Generate an evidence-backed pre-edit plan for a task, including primary files to edit, expected impact, changed-line ranges, and recommended test targets.

limit.description: Maximum planning results to generate. Defaults to 20.

since.description: Optional git revision/range used with git diff --unified=0 to include changed files and line ranges in planning context.

task.description: A natural language description of the task or change to plan.

tools.name: plan_change

tools.description: Record a repository-scoped memory fact with metadata, entity links, and confidence parameters.

confidence.description: The confidence level of the fact.

source.description: The source or tool that observed the fact. Defaults to 'mcp'.

tools.name: remember_fact

tools.description: Search through the append-only repository memory facts using keyword and entity matches.

limit.description: Maximum number of facts to return. Defaults to 20.

query.description: The search query to match against facts.

tools.name: search_memory

tools.description: Retrieve the metadata, syntax parsing status, and all code chunks for a single repository file.

path.description: The repository-relative path of the file.

tools.name: explain_file

tools.description: Retrieve definition, qualified name, range, and direct structural context for a given symbol name.
tools.name: explain_symbol

tools.description: Summarize the high-level architecture flows and directory boundaries within the repository.
tools.name: explain_flow

tools.description: Return a structured summary of the codebase architecture, including layer constraints and violation checks.
tools.name: summarize_architecture

tools.description: Analyze a file path and identify the test files that should be run to validate changes to it.

limit.description: Maximum test recommendations to return. Defaults to 20.

path.description: The repository-relative path of the file being changed.

tools.name: find_tests_for_change

tools.description: Recommend a comprehensive validation plan (test targets, coverage checks, static checks) for a file change.

limit.description: Maximum recommendations to return. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: recommend_validation_plan

tools.description: Retrieve and explain the test coverage metrics and associated test suites for a given file.

limit.description: Maximum coverage elements to return. Defaults to 20.

path.description: The repository-relative path of the file.

tools.name: explain_test_coverage

tools.description: Propose a patch plan (file edits, context bounds) for a task. Read-only; does not write any files.

task.description: A natural language description of the changes to propose.

tools.name: propose_patch

tools.description: Review a proposed patch plan for safety, target constraints, and completeness.

task.description: The task name or identifier associated with the patch.

tools.name: review_patch

tools.description: Validate a patch plan against codebase boundaries and references to detect warnings.
tools.name: validate_patch

tools.description: Verify an actual diff or set of changed files against a saved pre-edit plan. Validates constraints and runs test commands.

changed_files.description: List of repository-relative paths of changed files.

diff.description: The unified diff showing the actual changes.

plan.description: A JSON object containing the saved PlanReport.

plan_json.description: A JSON-encoded string representation of the PlanReport.

run_commands.description: Set true to execute the validation commands defined in the plan.

since_plan.description: Optional git revision/range used with git diff --unified=0 to derive changed files and diff input.

tools.name: verify_change

tools.description: Map a runtime stack trace to indexed source locations and file lines.

stacktrace.description: The stack trace string to analyze.

tools.name: map_stacktrace_to_code

tools.description: Retrieve recent runtime errors and stack traces associated with a given symbol.

query.description: The symbol name to look up errors for.

tools.name: find_errors_for_symbol

tools.description: Retrieve a list of recent runtime failures, errors, or incidents recorded in the repository.

limit.description: Maximum number of failure entries to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: find_recent_failures

tools.description: Retrieve the versioned schema defining the supported graph node types, edge types, and query properties available in the repository's structural evidence graph.
tools.name: get_evidence_schema

tools.description: Execute a read-only graph query using a constrained subset of Cypher. Call get_evidence_schema first to see available node/edge types. (Note: The DSL is NOT full Cypher). Output rows are JSON arrays aligned with the user-selected variables in `columns`.

limit.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50.

query.description: The graph query string to execute.

tools.name: query_evidence_graph
